# relayd Provider

The relayd provider manages authenticated HTTP control-plane resources exposed by relayd.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "relayd" {
  base_url     = "http://127.0.0.1:8080"
  bearer_token = "replace-me"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `base_url` (String) Base URL for the relayd API server. If omitted, the provider uses the RELAYD_BASE_URL environment variable. The `/v1` API path is added automatically when necessary.
- `bearer_token` (String, Sensitive) Bearer token for relayd API authentication. If omitted, the provider uses the RELAYD_BEARER_TOKEN environment variable.
